preamble: The velar nasal [ŋ] shifts to the voiceless uvular fricative [χ], involving a retraction of the place of articulation, weakening of the nasal manner, and a loss of voicing.

examples.note: Potential historical weakening of back nasals in contact with uvularized sounds.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
